MSTR “Will Strategy Buy BTC” Markets: Polymarket × Saylor Timeline

Scope expanded to every any-BTC market in the full history. Primary event source is Saylor's own tweets, recovered via Chrome/X search plus slow short-window scroll backfill and verified through oEmbed. The chart layer is now local ECharts with an SVG renderer — not pre-rendered JPG/PNG — use the slider, scroll, or drag below to inspect minute-level detail.
Coverage:
Signal taxonomy: a rule-based candidate pass first, then overridden by per-tweet semantic review. Strong BUY includes SaylorTracker / Strategy portfolio-tracker charts, dots/orange/green chart hints, charts being "not quite right," last week's work not yet reflected, and Back to Work / Working Weekend. Strong NOBUY includes No buys / No new dots / HODL this week. Signals are only attached to markets that were live AND whose title date range contains the tweet timestamp. Price-jump markers are categorized as "near a Saylor signal / pre-title-window order book / near market open / context tweets only / no nearby signal." High-priced markets are additionally audited by "remaining upside burn rate" rather than the absolute +20/+25 pp threshold. Charts are rendered live in the browser via ECharts + SVG, not pre-baked images. Full data:Full per-tweet semantic review CSV, High-value manual overrides CSV, Unique actionable-signal tweets CSV, Market annotations & price reactions CSV, Price-jump audit CSV, Tracker / headroom audit CSV.
